posts.author: sashawe (Sasha)
posts.cookedHtml:
New monday sales CRM demo: Learn the essentials

monday sales CRM has gone through a lot of changes in the last year – from new features to upgraded boards and so much more. If you want a refresher on everything CRM or want to learn about why monday sales CRM is so powerful, watch our new demo here

The 22-minute demo covers the essentials:

  • An intro to the sales pipeline
  • An overview of lead capturing and management
  • Contacts & account management
  • Deal management
  • Communication and activity tracking
  • Reporting

Let us know what you think in the comments below
